results.title: The Portal to Texas History
results.snippet: The Portal to Texas History is a gateway to rare, historical, and primary source materials from or about Texas. The Portal to Texas History Your Search Terms: Any Type Everything Set As Default Filter Popular Resource Types Newspapers Set A
